title: DfE Update: 1 October 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 advanced learner loans performance management point 1   Information Change to the 16 to 19 funded large programme uplift for academic year 2026 to 2027   Information Further education workforce data collection is now open   Information Claim window for the targeted retention incentive   Your feedback Adult funding allocation research: Monday 27 to Wednesday 29 October 2025-Your feedback on a new design for adult allocation statements     Latest for academies     Article Title     Information Change to the 16 to 19 funded large programme uplift for academic year 2026 to 2027   Information Pupil premium allocations for financial year 2025 to 2026 – quarter 2 update   Your feedback Invitation to access and feedback on Department for Education’s new estate management service   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Get help buying for schools webinar   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only: Monitoring and general maintenance risk management workshop   Events and webinars Financial benchmarking insights tool webinar   Events and webinars Autumn term webinars and Power Hours for School Business Professionals     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 advanced learner loans performance management point 1   Information Change to the 16 to 19 funded large programme uplift for academic year 2026 to 2027   Information Pupil premium allocations for financial year 2025 to 2026 – quarter 2 update   Your feedback Adult funding allocation research: Monday 27 to Wednesday 29 October 2025-Your feedback on a new design for adult allocation statements   Events and webinars Get help buying for schools webinar   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only: Monitoring and general maintenance risk management workshop   Events and webinars Financial benchmarking insights tool webinar   Events and webinars Autumn term webinars and Power Hours for School Business Professionals    "
